headlines.description: Argentina reached the final of the 2014 World Cup with a 4-2 penalty shootout win over Netherlands after a goalless 120 minutes in Sao Paulo.
headlines.shortLinkText: Netherlands (2) 0-0 (4) Argentina

headlines.description: Netherlands claimed their first third-placed finish at a World Cup as Brazil were brushed aside thanks to goals from Robin van Persie, Daley Blind and Georginio Wijnaldum.
headlines.shortLinkText: Brazil 0-3 Netherlands: Dutch claim bronze

headlines.description: Germany were crowned world champions for the fourth time after a stunning extra-time strike by substitute Mario Gotze secured a 1-0 victory over Argentina.
headlines.shortLinkText: Germany 1-0 Argentina: Gotze wins Cup
